dimensions.note: No credential/secret path touched. scanErrorKey re-encodes four already-operator-facing diagnostic segments (profile label, region, service, phase); none is token material, and AWS SDK credential resolution is unchanged.
No logging code changed. Log messages do not embed the storage key; the change only affects the stored scan_error row name, not any logged value.
classifyError/collectHaystack and the throw-before-write ordering are unchanged. Only scanErrorKey's per-segment encoding changed; failures still throw before writeResource.

_lib/scan_error_test.ts gains injectivity + determinism tests with teeth: an exact-format assertion, hyphen-boundary a-b|c vs a|b-c, literal 'ambient'/'account' vs empty segment, and same-tuple determinism, each of which fails if the bare-hyphen/sentinel encoding is restored. This extension's own scanErrorKey format test updated to the encoded form. All tests green.

scanErrorKey is deterministic (same tuple => same key), so re-runs overwrite the same row; reconcileScanErrors builds freshErrorKeys from the same function, so writers and reconcile stay consistent automatically. Pre-existing old-format rows self-heal via reconcile.
No SDK calls or request shapes changed; the scan_error kind enum and stored row shape are untouched.
No clients, handles, or files are affected by a pure key-encoding change.
Only source change is the regenerated shared _lib/scan_error.ts twin (scanErrorKey encoding); no README/fixture identifiers added or changed. Manifest and model.version aligned at 2026.07.20.1.
ScanErrorSchema and all resource schemas remain untouched strict z.object; the change is confined to the scanErrorKey pure function.
No resource/file spec lifetime or garbageCollection touched by this change.
Read-only fan-out scan (Describe*/Get* only); no create/update/delete lifecycle to complete. Unaffected by a key-encoding change.
The SSO pre-flight and profile-suffix refusal are unchanged in code; unaffected by the scanErrorKey change.

This IS the change: scanErrorKey is now injective. Each of the four segments is percent-encoded and any value-internal '-' escaped to %2D, so distinct (profile,region,service,phase) tuples can no longer collide. The prior hyphen-boundary (a-b|c vs a|b-c) and sentinel ('ambient' vs empty profile, 'account' vs empty region) collisions that dropped last-write-wins diagnostics are eliminated; all other instance-name construction is unchanged.
readResource/writeResource paths unchanged; only the scan_error row NAME encoding changed, not the stored attributes.

model.version bumped to 2026.07.20.1 with a matching no-op identity upgrade entry appended (description records the regenerated scanErrorKey twin, no globalArguments schema changes). The upgrades-tail toVersion equals model.version, verified by the passing metadata test.
